SEARCH
Package io.squid.cybreathe.models

Class Grid

java.lang.Object
io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Grid extends Object implements Serializable
Abstraction model for the 2D grid, managing cells and neighbors.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Grid(int width, int height)
    Constructs a Grid with the specified dimensions and fills it with default clean AirCell instances.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    commitNextStates()
    Commits the pre-calculated next states for all cells in the grid.
    void
    computeNextStates(Simulation simulation)
    Computes the next state for all cells in the grid, but does not commit them yet.
    AbstractCell
    getCell(int x, int y)
    Gets the cell at the specified coordinates.
    Map<String,Integer>
    getCellTypeCounts()
    Calculates the count of cells for each type in the grid.
    Map<String,Double>
    getCellTypePercentages()
    Calculates the percentage distribution of cells for each type in the grid.
    int
    getHeight()
    Gets the height of the grid.
    List<AbstractCell>
    getNeighbors(int x, int y)
    Gets the Moore neighbors (8 orthogonal and diagonal directions) of the cell at (x, y), ignoring any neighbors that are out of bounds.
    int
    getWidth()
    Gets the width of the grid.
    void
    setCell(int x, int y, AbstractCell cell)
    Sets the cell at the specified coordinates.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Grid

      public Grid(int width, int height)
      Constructs a Grid with the specified dimensions and fills it with default clean AirCell instances.
      Parameters:
      width - the width of the grid
      height - the height of the grid

  • Method Details

    • getWidth

      public int getWidth()
      Gets the width of the grid.
      Returns:
      the width

    • getHeight

      public int getHeight()
      Gets the height of the grid.
      Returns:
      the height

    • getCell

      public AbstractCell getCell(int x, int y)
      Gets the cell at the specified coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the cell
      y - the y-coordinate of the cell
      Returns:
      the AbstractCell at (x, y), or null if the coordinates are out of bounds

    • setCell

      public void setCell(int x, int y, AbstractCell cell)
      Sets the cell at the specified coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate where the cell should be placed
      y - the y-coordinate where the cell should be placed
      cell - the cell to set

    • computeNextStates

      public void computeNextStates(Simulation simulation)
      Computes the next state for all cells in the grid, but does not commit them yet. This prepares the double-buffered state calculations in parallel without interfering with other cell transitions.
      Parameters:
      simulation - the current simulation context containing parameters and current tick

    • commitNextStates

      public void commitNextStates()
      Commits the pre-calculated next states for all cells in the grid. This updates the active pollution level of each cell to its computed next state.

    • getNeighbors

      public List<AbstractCell> getNeighbors(int x, int y)
      Gets the Moore neighbors (8 orthogonal and diagonal directions) of the cell at (x, y), ignoring any neighbors that are out of bounds.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the cell
      y - the y-coordinate of the cell
      Returns:
      a list of neighboring cells

    • getCellTypeCounts

      public Map<String,Integer> getCellTypeCounts()
      Calculates the count of cells for each type in the grid. Splitting Air cells into clean "AIR" and "POLLUTED AIR" (pollution > 0).
      Returns:
      a map containing cell type names and their respective counts

    • getCellTypePercentages

      public Map<String,Double> getCellTypePercentages()
      Calculates the percentage distribution of cells for each type in the grid.
      Returns:
      a map containing cell type names and their respective percentage values (0.0 to 1.0)
